signals: This Master Services Agreement is entered into as of March 1, 2024
Vendor shall provide cloud hosting, managed Kubernetes orchestration, and 24/7 infrastructure monitoring services
Customer shall pay Vendor an annual subscription fee of $120,000 USD

commercial_terms.payment_terms: Customer shall pay Vendor an annual subscription fee of $120,000 USD, invoiced quarterly in advance at $30,000 per quarter. All invoices are due Net-30 from the invoice date. Late payments accrue interest at 1.5% per month.

renewal_and_termination.auto_renewal: Yes — auto-renews for successive one-year periods
renewal_and_termination.termination_notice_cause: 15 days to cure breach after notice

legal.dispute_resolution: binding arbitration in New York, NY under the rules of JAMS
legal.liability_cap: the total fees paid or payable by Customer in the twelve (12) months immediately preceding the claim

summary: This document is a Master Services Agreement between Acme Corporation and CloudBase Inc., effective from March 1, 2024, to February 28, 2025. The contract involves an annual subscription fee of $120,000 USD, paid quarterly, with automatic renewal unless terminated with 45 days' notice. The agreement includes provisions for cloud hosting services, a 99.9% uptime SLA, and dispute resolution through binding arbitration in New York, NY.
